folio.label: 194v
folio.l: ¢ O wooful hennes , rigút so cryden ©e
As whan æat Nero , brente the Citee
Of Rome , criden Senatoures wyues
For æ here housbondes losten alle here lyues
W outen gilt , this Nero hatú úe~ slayn
¢ Now wol I turne , vn to my tale a geyn
The sely wydewe , and eke hire dougútren two
Herden theise hennes crie , and maken woo
And out at the dores , stirten they a noon
And seye the fox , to ward the groue goon
And bar vp on his bak , the Cok a way
And criden out harrowe , & weylaway
Ha ha the fox , and after úi~ they ran
And eke w staues , many a nother man
Ran Colle oure dogge , and Talbot & gerland
And Malkyn witú a distaf , in hire hand
Ran kow and kalf , and eke the verray hogges
So feered for the berkyngö , of the dogges
And showtyngö of the men , and wo~men eke
They ronne so , úe~ thougút here hertes breke
They ©elleden as fendes , don in helle
The Dokes criden , as men wolde úe~ quelle
The Gees for fere , flowen ouä the trees
Out of the hyue , kom the swarme of bees
So hidous was the noise , a benedicitee
Certes he Iakke straw, & his meyne
Ne maden neuäe shoutes , half so shille
Whan æ they wolden , any flemmyngö kylle
As thilke day was maad , vp on the fox
Of Bras they broughten beemes , & of Box
Of horn , of Boon , in whicú they blew & pouped
And æäe witú al , they shrykeden & they houped
It semed , as æ heuene shulde falle
Now goode men I prey ©ow , herkenetú alle
Lo how fortune , turnetú sodeynly
The hope & pride eke , of hire enemy
This Cok æ lay , vp oon the foxes bak

note.notetxt: 585lay is written over an erasure, double check.ODR

folio.l: In al his drede , vn to the fox he spak
And seide sire , if I were as ©e
ñet wolde I seyn , as wys god helpe me
Turnetú a geyn , ©e proude Cherles alle
A verrey pestilence , vp oon ©ow falle
Now I am come~ vn to the wodes syde
Maugree ©oure hed , the Cook shal heere a bide
I wol úi~ ete in feitú , and that a noon
